name: Generic Utility

ruleReferences.description: Standard for interconnection of distributed energy resources
Inverter, Converter, Controller and Interconnection System Equipment
ruleReferences.requirement: All inverters must be UL 1741 listed
All interconnections must comply with NEC Article 705

disconnectRequirements.notes: Visible, lockable AC disconnect required. Verify specific requirements with local AHJ and utility.

labelingRequirements: Verify labeling requirements with local AHJ
notes: Generic utility rules applied. Verify specific interconnection requirements with your local utility and AHJ before permit submission.
